name: French Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking soda, cocoa powder, and salt; set aside.
2. Cream butter until fluffy and light, then add water, sour cream, and vanilla. Mix in the flour mixture and beat until smooth.
3. Beat egg whites for 1 minute, then fold into the batter. Pour batter into 2 well-greased and lightly floured cake pans.
4. Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 25-30 minutes. Cool completely.
5. Frost with Brown Sugar Chocolate Frosting.
Brown Sugar Chocolate Frosting:
1. Combine brown sugar, water, and butter in a saucepan. Cook until a little syrup dropped into cold water forms a soft ball.
2. Remove from heat and add chocolate; stir until melted and smooth.
3. Blend in sifted confectioners' sugar and 1/4 teaspoon salt, alternating with cream. Beat well, then add 1 teaspoon vanilla.
4. Thin with additional cream if necessary, a few drops at a time.
